name: io.github.Servosity/kaseya-bms-mcp
title: Kaseya BMS MCP
description: CLI and MCP server for Kaseya BMS PSA: tickets, CRM, contracts, finance, and offline analytics.

environmentVariables.name: KASEYA_BMS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Pre-minted Kaseya BMS JWT, sent as a Bearer token. Set this OR KASEYA_BMS_BEARER_AUTH; alternatively run 'kaseya-bms-cli auth login' to mint one from username/password/tenant.

environmentVariables.name: KASEYA_BMS_BEARER_AUTH
environmentVariables.description: Alias for KASEYA_BMS_TOKEN - a pre-minted Kaseya BMS JWT sent as a Bearer token. Set one of the two, or use 'auth login'.
